_schema_meta.insurer: HDFC ERGO General Insurance Company Limited
_schema_meta.source_document: Policy Wording + Customer Information Sheet — Optima Secure
_schema_meta.notes: Pure product rules. No user data. Shared across every user who uploads an Optima Secure policy. Optima Secure differs from Optima Restore in three critical ways: (1) Protect Benefit is DEFAULT ON — Annexure B consumables are covered unless explicitly opted out. (2) Secure Benefit — additional SI pool equal to 100% of base SI. (3) Plus Benefit replaces Multiplier Benefit — same 50% accrual mechanics, different name. Restore mechanics also differ — base restore CAN be used for same disease same year per Section 2.6(vi), and Unlimited Restore add-on removes the once-per-year cap entirely.

room_rent.modifier_available: Section B.2.13 — Optional 'Modification of Room Rent' add-on can change this
room_rent.insight: No room rent cap. Any room category can be chosen without triggering proportionate deduction on the entire bill. Most policies cap room at 1% of SI per day and penalise the whole bill if exceeded — this one does not.

initial_waiting_days.insight: All new illnesses have a 30-day waiting period from policy start. Accidents are covered immediately from day 1.

exceptions: accidents exempt from this waiting period
specific_disease_waiting.enhanced_si_note: Waiting period applies afresh to the extent of enhanced sum insured
specific_disease_waiting.interaction_with_ped: If a specified disease also qualifies as PED, the longer of the two waiting periods applies
illnesses: Diseases of gall bladder including cholecystitis
Calculus diseases of Urogenital system (Kidney stone, Urinary Bladder Stone)
Benign tumors, cysts, nodules, polyps including breast lumps
Ulcer and erosion of stomach and duodenum
Cataract and other disorders of lens and Retina
surgical_procedures: Surgery for prolapsed inter vertebral disc
Surgery of Genito urinary system unless necessitated by Malignancy
Surgery for varicose veins and varicose ulcers
specific_disease_waiting.clause: Section C — Code Excl02 — Policy Wording Pages 31-32
specific_disease_waiting.insight: 24 conditions and procedures have a 24-month waiting period from policy inception, even if not pre-existing. Key ones buyers miss: cataract surgery, hernia, gallbladder removal, kidney stones, joint replacement, piles surgery, sinusitis. Enhanced SI restarts this clock only for the enhanced portion.
specific_disease_waiting.source: Full policy wording Section C Code Excl02 — verified from PDF

ped_waiting.note: Actual value stipulated in the policy schedule — varies by underwriting. Can be 12, 24, or 36 months. Check user_schedule.waiting_periods.blocks for this user's specific remaining months.
ped_waiting.addon_ref: Section B.2.12 — PED wait period modification
ped_waiting.insight: Pre-existing diseases have a waiting period of 12, 24, or 36 months from first policy inception depending on underwriting. Check the schedule page for specific remaining months per SI block.

waiting_periods.enhanced_si_note: If you increase your sum insured at renewal, waiting periods start afresh only for the enhanced portion.

base_restore.trigger: complete or partial utilisation of base SI due to any admitted claim
base_restore.note: Base automatic restore triggers once per year. Critically, it CAN be used for the same disease — Section 2.6(vi) explicitly states restored sum can be used for the same illness. The Unlimited Restore add-on removes the once-per-year cap.
base_restore.insight: Your base policy restores 100% of your SI once per year if exhausted — and it CAN be used for the same disease in the same year. With the Unlimited Restore add-on, this triggers unlimited times with no same-disease restriction.

unlimited_restore_addon.clause: Section B.2.6(i) — Policy Wording Page 18; Annexure C Add-on #4
unlimited_restore_addon.insight: With Unlimited Restore active, SI is restored unlimited times for ANY claim — same disease, same year, unlimited times. This is the most valuable feature on this policy that most buyers don't know they have. Must be explicitly opted.

plus_benefit.amount: 50% of base SI of expiring policy
plus_benefit.note: This is NOT a no-claim bonus. It accrues whether or not claims were made in the previous year. Called 'Plus Benefit' on Optima Secure — equivalent to 'Multiplier Benefit' on Optima Restore.
plus_benefit.insight: SI grows by 50% at every renewal regardless of claims. After 2 claim-free years, you can have up to 100% extra SI at no additional premium. A lapse resets this.

secure_benefit.availability: available as additional SI for all admissible claims
secure_benefit.note: Secure Benefit is unique to Optima Secure — Optima Restore does not have an equivalent. It effectively doubles the coverage ceiling on top of base SI.
secure_benefit.insight: On top of your base SI, you have an equal additional pool called Secure Benefit. For a ₹25L policy, this gives another ₹25L — effectively doubling your coverage ceiling before Restore even triggers.

effective_coverage_ceiling.note: For a user with ₹25L base SI: ₹25L base + ₹25L Secure Benefit + unlimited Restore of ₹25L each time = effectively uncapped for multiple admissions in a year

layer_1_base_hospitalization.note: Covered under BASE hospitalization without any add-on. Most buyers and even some hospital TPA staff are unaware of this.

layer_2_protect_benefit.default_status_for_optima_secure: DEFAULT ON — must be explicitly opted OUT to remove
layer_2_protect_benefit.source: Annexure C Page 65: 'Default: Covered upto sum insured. Optional: To remove benefit.'
layer_2_protect_benefit.covers: Non-Medical Expenses listed in Annexure B — 68 items including gloves, masks, attendant charges, syringes, PPE, crepe bandages, diapers, laundry, baby food and more
layer_2_protect_benefit.clause: Section B.2.3 + Annexure B + Annexure C — Policy Wording Pages 16, 56-59, 65
layer_2_protect_benefit.insight: Protect Benefit covers non-medical consumables (gloves, masks, syringes, PPE, Annexure B items) by DEFAULT on Optima Secure. Combined with Layer 1 (IV fluids, blood, surgical appliances), this covers a wide range of hospital consumables that most other policies — including Optima Restore — deduct from settlements.
layer_2_protect_benefit.ezer_comparison_note: Optima Secure INCLUDES Annexure B items via Protect Benefit (default ON). Optima Restore EXCLUDES Annexure I items. This is one of the most significant product differences between the two HDFC ERGO products.

preventive_health_checkup.claimable_timing: After policy renews — NOT during current policy year
preventive_health_checkup.condition: Not available if Aggregate Deductible of INR 5 Lakhs or more is in force
preventive_health_checkup.insight: Health checkup benefit claimable only AFTER renewal — not during the current policy year. Does not carry forward if unclaimed. Get checkup done before renewal date and claim it in the first months of the renewed policy.

post_hospitalization.insight: 180 days post-discharge coverage — significantly better than the industry standard of 60-90 days. Follow-up visits, medicines, physiotherapy can all be claimed within 6 months of discharge.

aggregate_deductible.note: Aggregate deductible is NOT inbuilt. Optional add-on to reduce premium. If opted, no claims payable until total claims exceed the deductible in a policy year.

moratorium_period.effect: After 60 continuous months, insurer cannot contest any claim on grounds of non-disclosure or misrepresentation except proven fraud and permanent exclusions
what_moratorium_closes: Denial citing misrepresentation at proposal stage
what_moratorium_does_not_close: Denial citing treatment not medically necessary
Denial citing excluded provider or excluded hospital
Denial citing reasonable and customary charges
Denial citing permanent exclusions in policy
moratorium_period.enhanced_si_note: 60-month clock restarts from date of enhancement only for the enhanced SI portion

standard_exclusions.name: Obesity surgery not meeting BMI criteria
Cosmetic or plastic surgery except post-accident reconstruction
Hazardous or adventure sports as professional
Breach of law with criminal intent
Health hydros, nature cure clinics, spas
OTC dietary supplements unless prescribed during hospitalisation
Sterility and infertility including IVF, surrogacy

specific_exclusions: Non-medical expenses unless Protect Benefit is active
optional_addons_available: Protect Benefit — Annexure B consumables (DEFAULT ON for Optima Secure — must opt OUT to remove)
PED Waiting Period Modification — Section B.2.12
Modification of Room Rent — Section B.2.13
